hero.subhead: Custom NFC plaques, designed and 3D-printed in Barcelona for restaurants, bars and cafés. One tap sends every guest exactly where you want them — reviews, socials, menu. No app, no QR, no friction.

t1.quote: We tripled our Google reviews in the first month. Guests love that it feels like an object, not a QR sticker.
t1.name: Marta Puig

t2.quote: It sits on the counter like a piece of the brand. Nobody asks what it is — they just tap.
t2.name: Iván Ruiz

t3.quote: The design felt tailored to us from the first sketch. Worth every euro.
t3.name: Clara Ferrer

how.title: From brand brief to a tap on the counter.

brief.title: Brief
brief.body: We study your brand, your palette and the vibe of your space.

design.title: Design
design.body: A concept sketched around your identity — not a template.

print.title: Print
print.body: Precision 3D-printed in Barcelona, finished by hand.

embed.title: Embed
embed.body: NFC chips placed and programmed — one tap zone per action.

product.title: A physical object that does the work of a whole marketing stack.
product.body: Every Tapiko plaque holds one NFC chip per tap zone. Guests hover their phone over a zone and land exactly where you sent them — no app, no scan, no friction.
product.specs: Chip NTAG213 / 215  ·  Material PLA / PETG  ·  Up to 4 tap zones  ·  Fully custom design  ·  Lead time 7–14 days

pricing.title: Choose the plaque that fits your counter.
pricing.note: Final price depends on design complexity and volume. Multiple locations? Ask about chain pricing.

plus.name: Tapiko Plus
plus.desc: Change your tap destinations anytime — swap a review link for a seasonal promo — plus simple tap analytics and priority support.

chain.title: Restaurant group or multiple locations? Get custom pricing.

essential.name: Essential
essential.desc: One custom plaque, one NFC action. Perfect for driving Google reviews.

signature.name: Signature
signature.desc: Two actions on one object — reviews plus Instagram, for example. Fully custom design.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Full multi-action plaque — reviews, socials and menu — premium finish and priority turnaround.

gallery.title: A few pieces we've made.
gallery.subtitle: Every plaque is designed from scratch. No two look alike.

case.title: Bar Deriva, Barceloneta.
case.brief: A small beach bar with a devoted regulars scene, but almost no online presence. Warm sunsets, salt in the air, terracotta everywhere.
case.solution: A rounded, sunset-terracotta piece with two tap zones: leave a Google review, or follow the sunset on Instagram. It lives next to the till.
case.result: Over 90 new five-star reviews in three months and a doubled Instagram following.

why.title: Not a QR sticker. A real object with your name on it.

custom.title: Custom-branded
custom.body: Designed around your identity — colour, typography, silhouette.

physical.title: A real physical product
physical.body: A premium object on the counter. Not a paper square you'll replace next month.

results.title: Drives reviews & followers
results.body: Every guest becomes a tap that grows your online presence.

lead.title: Tell us about your place.
lead.subtitle: We'll design a first concept for you — no commitment.

form.name: Your name
form.sent: Thanks — we'll be in touch shortly.

whatsapp.title: Prefer WhatsApp?
whatsapp.body: Message us directly and we'll reply within the day.

call.title: Book a 20-minute call
call.body: We'll walk through your brand and sketch a first idea live.

how.a: Each tap zone contains a small NFC chip programmed to open a URL. When a phone comes within a couple of centimetres, that URL opens instantly in the browser.

app.a: No. Modern iPhones and Android phones read NFC natively — no app, no setup, no scan. Just tap.

time.a: Typical lead time is 7–14 days from brief to a finished plaque on your counter. Rush turnaround is available on the Pro tier.

editable.q: Can I change where it links to later?
editable.a: Yes. With Tapiko Plus you can update any tap destination from your dashboard — swap a review link for a seasonal promo whenever you like.

durable.q: Is it durable enough for a bar?
durable.a: Yes. We print in PLA / PETG with a sealed matte finish. It handles spills, wipes and daily counter life — treat it like a nice ceramic object.

footer.tagline: Custom NFC objects, designed and printed in Barcelona.
